publishedAbstract: This article describes a procedure for installing and upgrading [SAP Data Intelligence (3.3)](https://help.sap.com/viewer/product/SAP_DATA_INTELLIGENCE_ON-PREMISE/3.3.latest/en-US) / [(3.2)](https://help.sap.com/viewer/product/SAP_DATA_INTELLIGENCE_ON-PREMISE/3.2.latest/en-US) / [(3.1)](https://help.sap.com/viewer/product/SAP_DATA_INTELLIGENCE_ON-PREMISE/3.1.latest/en-US) on OpenShift Container Platform 4. We will refer to SAP Data Intelligence with an abbreviation SDI from now on. Red Hat OpenShift Container Platform has been validated for running SDI.
publishedTitle: SAP Data Intelligence 3 on OpenShift Container Platform 4
